title: Burnth4m's Devil Arms
description: This mod adds in some weapons from Devil May Cry, that can be found in structures generated throughout the world.
body:
This mod adds various weapons from the Devil May Cry games. I made this mod for a friend's server and decided to upload it. It has many issues and I will not be updating it.

Rebellion: 8 damage. Found in a structure in the overworld.

Sparda: 10 damage. Found in a structure in the nether.

Yamato: 20 damage. Found in a very rare end structure.

Devil Sword Dante: 20 damage. Crafted by putting the Sparda and Rebellion in a crafting grid in the Standalone version, and by putting the Sparda, Rebellion, and a Sentient Core in a crafting grid in the RLCraft version.


KNOWN ISSUES:
The Rebellion is the only weapon to show in the Creative tab. I'm too lazy to fix this.
The /give ids for these weapons are:

devilarms:rebellion (Rebellion)

devilarms:ds_sparda (Sparda)

devilarms:yamato (Yamato)

devilarms:ds_dante (Dante)
